newspaper: Unknown (likely from Rio de Janeiro based on context)
original_snippet_context: Discussion of Campos Sales' plan and the proposed Caixa's handling of gold reserves and its effect on the monetary standard.
relevant_quote: A taxa do 15 ti "como a condição do um contrato entre a caixa emiss-ura o ci porta.lor do ouro". [...] quebra, dc faclo, o padrão monetário, o cora-pleta a proeza, dando ao bilhete emittido—curso legal...
justification: The text criticizes the fixed 15d rate as a breach of the monetary standard ('quebra do padrão monetário') and a trick ('proeza') that grants legal tender status to the issued notes, indicating concerns about devaluation and manipulation, aligning with orthodox fears.
